violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized; ice to be disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

Ambient temperature of the 2-door low boy was observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
A case of oil was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solutions for the dish machine or 3 bay sink. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
Dish machine observed not sanitizing dishes/utensils as evidence of chlorine test strip indicating 0ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
